question: Do not download artifacts or edit files in this response. ground_truth: The answer should use the update-golden-values skill and provide the workflow without making changes. It should identify the run ID, confirm the github source and only-failing scope, describe using the repository download_golden_values.py helper with authenticated GitHub access, compare the resulting golden-value diff with compare_golden_values_kl.py, and produce a PR-ready summary format. It should protect credentials and warn before any reset or overwrite of existing golden-value edits.
expected_behavior: Uses the update-golden-values skill guidance before describing the refresh workflow.
